title: Egyptian World
description: Adds Ancient Egypt dimension and other related stuff to Minecraft.
body:
### Do you want Egyptian vibes in Minecraft?
### 
### Then this mod is for you!
### 
### Welcome to the world of sands, deserts and gold!


Adds new dimension!

Do you want to build your own Egyptian city, but you tired to find good enough desert? Just enter new dimension of deserts and new biomes, like palm forests, limestone rocks, reed fields, sandstone rocks and magical oasis! Explore dimension to find new **unique structures like pyramids and temples!**
To build portal you need blocks called Golden Ankh (8 blocks of smooth sandstone + block of gold in center) and Pharaoh's scepter for activation.

**Statues of Ancient Egyptian gods and animals!**
Decor your world with new statues: **Anubis, Sobek, Maat, Isis, Ra, Horus and more!**

**New weapon:** Khopesh! (Wooden, stone, iron, diamond, golden and netherite) Khopesh is a famous sickle-shaped sword used by warriors of Ancient Egypt. Its' damage same as sword's but faster and requires more resources to craft.

Added **reeds**: reeds are used to make papyrus (alternative for paper). 9 reeds makes 3 papyrus.
Added **palms** and palm wooden set: planks, fence, pressure plate etc.

New stone type and set: **limestone**.

**Armor:** Anubis mask and reinforced Egyptian chestplate.

**JEI is recommended for recipes.**

_Known issues: command /weather don't work in Ancient Egypt dimension._
